Effects.Message: Pilot: It looks like they have the hard drive. Get in the helicopter so we can get out of here!
Are you sure you need a spare candle?
Im just a product of...
Actually, never mind.
Are you sure you need a spare candle?
Captain: "Listen carefully. Forty-eight hours ago, we lost contact with the 'Scorpion' Laboratory following a catastrophic failure in its underground power plant."
Captain: "The emergency system initiated a complete lockdown to prevent a potential biological leak."
"A rapid response team was deployed to investigate. We lost contact with them as well."
"Since then, no one inside the facility has responded to our communications."
"Our priority is not to rescue survivors. Your mission is to recover the central hard drive from the laboratory's server room."
"That device contains all research data, accident records, and classified information that cannot be allowed to disappear."
"Remote access is impossible. You'll have to make your way through manually, restore damaged systems, and find the credentials needed to proceed."
"We don't know what you'll find down there. Keep your masks on and stay alert."
"Get in, recover the drive, and make it back alive."
"Good luck, team."

RejectionEffects.PrimaryTitle: You need to have an access card in your hand.

Effects.Message: Pilot: Okay, let's get out of here!
Captain: "Excellent work, team."
Captain: "We confirm the successful extraction of the hard drive. The device is now secured and will be transported to Central Base along with your squad."
"Our analysis teams will take it from here. Your mission has been a success."
"Maintain formation until you return to base."
"Command out."
Pilot: "We've arrived at one of the laboratory entrances. We'll be waiting here."
Captain: The main door will open. One inside, you'll need to stabilize the problems affecting the laboratory.
Pilot: Why AGAIN?
Pilot: We haven't arrived yet!
Co-Pilot: Seriously!?
Co-Pilot: YOU GUYS ARE LOSING DOOR PRIVILEGES FROM NOW ON!!
Pilot: Why did thay open the doors!?
Pilot: Close them!!
